briefs.title: BC Transit Development Cost Charge Instalment Rules Grandfathered for Pre-2026 Elections
briefs.summary: A new BC regulation protects developers who chose to pay their TransLink development cost charge (a fee charged to developers to help fund transit infrastructure) in instalments before January 1, 2026. If a developer made their first instalment payment under the old rules before that date, the old payment rules continue to apply to their entire charge — the new rules do not override them.
briefs.action_required: If you elected instalment payments and paid your first instalment before Jan 1, 2026, confirm your file is flagged under the old payment rules.

key_dates.label: BC TransLink Development Cost Charge new payment rules take effect
